testcase.name: testCreateEmployee
testcase.system-out:
[BROWSER] Closed.
[BROWSER] Opened. === TEST 13: Create Employee - Full E2E Validation === ============================================================
[STEP 1] Generated unique employee data: Name : Test Employee1784368807624 Role : QA Automation Engineer Email : testuser.1784368807624@automation.test Salary : 62000 Phone : 9368807624 Dept : Engineering Manager : Admin
[STEP 2] Pre-checking MockAPI for duplicate email... [MockAPI] GET status: 200 [OK] Email is unique - proceeding.
[STEP 3] Logging in as Admin... [SETUP] Session cleared. [OK] Logged in as Admin. [INFO] Initial employee count in UI: 12
[STEP 4] Capturing screenshot BEFORE form opens... [SCREENSHOT] Saved: D:\Frontend Automaton\Final Project\employee-management\employee-manage\EmployeeAutomation\screenshots\20260718_153012_030_01_before_form_open.png
[STEP 5] Clicking Add Employee button (once)... [OK] Modal opened.
[STEP 6] Filling form fields... [OK] Filled: name=Test Employee1784368807624 | email=testuser.1784368807624@automation.test | role=QA Automation Engineer
[STEP 7] Capturing screenshot with form filled (before submit)... [SCREENSHOT] Saved: D:\Frontend Automaton\Final Project\employee-management\employee-manage\EmployeeAutomation\screenshots\20260718_153014_110_02_form_filled_before_submit.png
[STEP 8] Clicking Save (single click)... [OK] Save button disabled during submission: true
[STEP 9] Waiting for modal to close (success state)... [OK] Modal closed - employee creation succeeded. (Req 6 verified)
[STEP 10] Capturing screenshot after successful creation... [SCREENSHOT] Saved: D:\Frontend Automaton\Final Project\employee-management\employee-manage\EmployeeAutomation\screenshots\20260718_153020_532_03_after_employee_created.png
[STEP 11] Verifying employee appears in UI list... [OK] Employee 'Test Employee1784368807624' is visible in UI list. (Req 7 passed) [SCREENSHOT] Saved: D:\Frontend Automaton\Final Project\employee-management\employee-manage\EmployeeAutomation\screenshots\20260718_153021_007_04_employee_visible_in_list.png
[STEP 12] Verifying employee exists in MockAPI... [MockAPI] GET status: 200 [MockAPI Response - first 400 chars]: [{"password":"pass123","name":"John Smith","email":"john.smith@company.com","phone":"555-0101","department":"Engineering","role":"Software Engineer","joinDate":"2025-10-12T13:06:19.645Z","salary":75000,"avatar":"JS","status":"active","address":"574 Alia Path","manager":"Admin","employeeType":"Full-Time","skills":"skills 1","bankaccount":"29454851","pan":"pan 1","id":"1"},{"password":"pass123","nam [OK] Employee found in MockAPI by email. (Req 8 passed)
============================================================ [SUMMARY] Employee Creation Results: | Name : Test Employee1784368807624 | Role : QA Automation Engineer | Email : testuser.1784368807624@automation.test | Dept : Engineering | Salary : 62000 | Phone : 9368807624 | Manager : Admin | MockAPI ID: 14 | In MockAPI: true | In UI : true ============================================================ [PASSED] TEST 13: Employee created, verified in UI and MockAPI.
